description: Welcome to BZ Motors, your premier destination for high-quality vehicles in South Gate, Los Angeles. We are excited to present to you the stunning 2016 Mercedes-Benz GLE, a top-of-the-line SUV that exudes luxury and performance. This vehicle is available now at our dealership, and we can't wait to show you all that it has to offer.                                                                                The 2016 Mercedes-Benz GLE is a true testament to the brand's commitment to excellence. With its sleek and modern design, this SUV is sure to turn heads on the road. The GLE 350 Sport Utility 4D model boasts a powerful V6 engine and a smooth 7-speed 7G-TRONIC+ automatic transmission, making every drive a thrilling experience. And with rear-wheel drive and ABS (4-wheel) braking, you can trust in the GLE's performance and handling.                                                                                Step inside the 2016 Mercedes-Benz GLE and experience true luxury. This SUV is equipped with all the features you could want and more. Stay comfortable with dual-zone air conditioning and heated seats, while the Harman/Kardon sound system and HD AM/FM stereo provide an immersive audio experience. The COMAND infotainment system allows for easy access to navigation, music, and more, all at your fingertips.                                                                                 The GLE also offers advanced safety features such as blind-spot alert, lane departure warning, and a backup camera, giving you peace of mind on the road. And with the mbrace system, you can connect to your vehicle remotely and access important information and features with ease.                                                                                The 2016 Mercedes-Benz GLE is not just about luxury and performance, it also offers convenience and technology features to enhance your driving experience. Keyless entry and KEYLESS-GO allow for easy access to the vehicle, while the power liftgate and power third row make loading and unloading a breeze. And with the electronic stability control and hill start assist control, you can feel confident driving in any condition.                                                                                 Stay connected on the go with Bluetooth wireless and SiriusXM satellite radio, and keep your devices charged with multiple USB ports. The GLE also features a tilt and telescoping wheel for added comfort, and power windows and door locks for added convenience.                                                                                Don't miss out on the opportunity to own the luxurious 2016 Mercedes-Benz GLE. Visit BZ Motors in South Gate, Los Angeles today and take this SUV for a test drive. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff will be happy to assist you and answer any questions you may have. description: Find Your Perfect Ride at BZ Motors in South Gate, Los AngelesLooking for a reliable and stylish sedan that will turn heads on the road? Look no further than BZ Motors in South Gate, Los Angeles. Our wide selection of vehicles includes the highly sought-after 2018 Honda Accord Sport Sedan 4D. With its sleek design and top-of-the-line features, this car is sure to exceed your expectations. Keep reading to learn more about this amazing vehicle and why you should make it your next  Performance with the 2018 Honda AccordThe 2018 Honda Accord Sport Sedan 4D is equipped with a powerful 1.5-liter turbocharged 4-cylinder engine that delivers an impressive 192 horsepower. Paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission, this car offers smooth and efficient performance on the road. The i-VTEC technology ensures maximum power and fuel efficiency, making it a great choice for both city and highway  that's not all - the Honda Accord also comes with a variety of advanced features to enhance your driving experience. The Adaptive Cruise Control allows you to maintain a safe distance from the vehicle in front of you, while the Hill Start Assist Control ensures a smooth start on steep inclines. With the Lane Departure Warning and Traction Control, you can feel confident and in control behind the  Design and Top-Notch FeaturesThe 2018 Honda Accord Sport Sedan 4D is not just a performance powerhouse - it also boasts a sleek and modern design. The LED headlights and fog lights not only add to the overall aesthetic, but also provide improved visibility on the road. description: This  2018 Honda CR-V EX, has a Crystal Black Pearl exterior and an Black interior color. 116,074 miles.  Stock Number 3100. Visit us today at 1342 West Wade Hampton Greer SC 29650 or call us at (864) 244-8880.             Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.    Call or text (864) 244-8880 to set up a time to see it today!  We offer Full-spectrum Financing and Service Contracts at competitive rates. description: Our ready-to-work One Owner 2018 Ford Transit Connect XL Cargo Van in Silver goes above and beyond. Powered by a 2.5 Liter Duratec 4 Cylinder that offers 169hp connected to a 6 Speed SelectShift Automatic transmission for easy passing or towing. This Front Wheel Drive hauler is ready for anything Mother Nature offers and scores nearly 27mpg on the highway! Our van is built on a car platform, so it's quite maneuverable in tight spots, easy to park, and a pleasure to drive, and it boasts a best-in-class payload and towing capacity. Enhanced by dual sliding doors, the functional exterior design of our XL is dual-purpose; it's a perfect space for a company logo and allows a good 135 cubic ft of cargo space that is easy to use due to the low step-in height.   This XL workhorse has all the basics in order, and the interior allows you to fully customize it depending on what you require for your transportation. You'll appreciate keyless entry, seats, supportive seats for those long workdays, and a tilt and telescoping steering wheel. At the same time, AC, an armrest, and an AM/FM stereo with an auxiliary audio input jack make the trips more enjoyable.   This Ford comes equipped with top-notch safety features like ABS, stability/traction control, hill start assist, front-seat side airbags, and side curtain airbags that give you peace of mind and help you manage challenging driving situations. This Transit Connect XL is an intelligent choice for you! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your Test Drive Towards Ownership! .[!@@Additional Info@@!]Engine: 2.5L Duratec I4

description: Discover the perfect balance of style, performance, and practicality in this 2018 Chevrolet Equinox LS. With its sleek Ivy Metallic Green exterior and well-appointed interior, this Equinox is ready to elevate your driving experience. You can trust that this vehicle is ready to provide reliable, comfortable, and enjoyable transportation.  Certified Pre-Owned Assurance  For added peace of mind, this Equinox is part of our Certified Pre-Owned program. That means it has undergone a comprehensive 172-point inspection and comes with a CARFAX vehicle history report, 6-year/100,000-mile powertrain limited warranty, and 24/7 roadside assistance. You can drive with confidence, knowing this Equinox has been meticulously evaluated and approved.  Impressive Efficiency and Capability  Powered by a 1.5L DOHC engine and 6-speed automatic transmission, this Equinox delivers an impressive 26 MPG in the city and 32 MPG on the highway. The front-wheel-drive configuration provides a smooth, responsive ride, while the four-wheel independent suspension ensures confident handling. With a suite of advanced safety features, including ABS brakes, electronic stability control, and a rearview camera, you can navigate the roads with peace of mind.  Thoughtful Amenities and Connectivity  Step inside the well-appointed cabin and you'll be greeted by premium cloth seating, a 6-speaker audio system, and Chevrolet's MyLink infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. Stay connected and entertained on every journey.  Discover the Perfect Fit  This 2018 Chevrolet Equinox LS is the ideal blend of style, efficiency, and functionality. description: 2018 Ford EcoSport S Sport Utility 4D - BZ Motors                                  2018 Ford EcoSport S Sport Utility 4D                  Available at BZ Motors in South Gate, Los Angeles                                                Stylish and Reliable SUV                      Are you in the market for a new SUV? Look no further than the 2018 Ford EcoSport S Sport Utility 4D. This vehicle offers both style and reliability, making it the perfect choice for any car buyer. With its sleek design and advanced features, the EcoSport is sure to turn heads on the road.                                      Powerful Engine                      The 2018 Ford EcoSport is equipped with a 3-cylinder turbo engine, providing you with the power and performance you need for your daily commute or weekend adventures. With a 6-speed SelectShift automatic transmission and front-wheel drive, this SUV offers a smooth and efficient driving experience. Say goodbye to frequent trips to the gas station, as the EcoSport has excellent fuel efficiency.                                      Advanced Features                      The EcoSport is packed with advanced features to enhance your driving experience. With ABS (4-wheel) and AdvanceTrac, you can feel confident and in control on any road condition. The backup camera and rear parking sensors make parking and reversing a breeze. Stay connected with the SYNC infotainment system, which includes AM/FM stereo, CD/MP3 player, and Bluetooth connectivity. And with keyless entry and power locks, you can easily access and secure your vehicle.                                      Safety First                      When it comes to safety, the 2018 Ford EcoSport has you covered. It is equipped with dual airbags, knee airbags, and front and rear side curtain airbags to protect you and your passengers in case of a collision. The EcoSport also features hill start assist control, ensuring a smooth start on steep inclines. With daytime running lights and fog lights, you can have better visibility on the road, increasing your safety while driving.                                      Convenience at Your Fingertips                      The EcoSport is designed with convenience in mind. With power steering and tilt & telescoping wheel, you can easily adjust your driving position for maximum comfort. The air conditioning system will keep you cool and comfortable on hot summer days. And with power windows, you can easily control the ventilation and natural light in your vehicle.                                      Visit BZ Motors Today                      Ready to experience the 2018 Ford EcoSport for yourself? Stop by BZ Motors in South Gate, Los Angeles and take it for a test drive. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff will be happy to assist you and answer any questions you may have. Don't miss out on this opportunity to own a stylish and reliable SUV. Visit BZ Motors today!                                            © 2019 BZ Motors. All rights reserved.

description: Experience the thrill of driving a 2019 Tesla Model 3 Standard Range Plus, a stylish and efficient electric sedan that combines cutting-edge technology with sleek design. With a striking Midnight Silver Metallic exterior complemented by a sophisticated black interior, this used vehicle offers a perfect blend of elegance and innovation. Powered by a powerful 283-horsepower electric motor and 317 lb-ft of torque, this Model 3 delivers impressive acceleration and a smooth, quiet ride. Its RWD drivetrain ensures responsive handling, while features like a backup camera, blind spot monitor, and collision warning elevate your safety on every journey. Enjoy modern conveniences such as Bluetooth connectivity, keyless entry, memory seats, navigation, push start, heated seats, and a sunroof/moonroof, making every drive comfortable and connected.This Tesla Model 3 is equipped with an array of advanced safety and security features designed to protect you and your passengers. The vehicle's traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting help you maintain safe driving conditions. Dual front knee airbags, front camera system, and front and rear parking sensors enhance situational awareness and collision prevention. The regenerative braking system improves efficiency, while multiple dash camerasincluding front, rear, and side recordingsprovide added security. Four-wheel ABS ensures optimal braking performance in all conditions. Whether you're navigating city streets or scenic highways, this Model 3 combines safety technology with peace of mind.2019 Tesla Model 3 Safety and Security FeaturesThe 2019 Tesla Model 3 comes with an impressive suite of safety features, starting with traffic sign recognition and adaptive speed limiting to help keep you within safe driving parameters. It also includes dual front knee airbags and a front camera system that supports enhanced visibility. Parking sensors at the front and rear aid in tight spaces, complemented by regenerative braking that maximizes energy efficiency. Multiple dash cameras record 360-degree footage, capturing the road ahead, behind, and on the sides for added security. Four-wheel anti-lock braking system (ABS) ensures responsive stopping power in various driving conditions, making this vehicle a safe and smart choice for daily commuting and beyond.2019 Tesla Model 3 Entertainment and Technology FeaturesStay connected and entertained with the Tesla Model 3's advanced technology suite. The standout 15-inch infotainment screen provides easy access to navigation, media, and vehicle controls. The vehicle supports a smart device app that allows you to use your phone as a key and offers full compatibility with the Tesla App for remote climate control, charging management, and vehicle status updates. Wi-Fi hotspot capability keeps you connected on the go, while the voice-operated HD radio ensures clear audio quality. The touch screen display offers intuitive control over media, navigation data with real-time traffic updates, and access to streaming radio via TuneIn. With seven speakers distribute crisp sound throughout the cabin, this Model 3 keeps everyone entertained and informed.2019 Tesla Model 3 Performance FeaturesOutstanding performance is a hallmark of the 2019 Tesla Model 3 Standard Range Plus. The electric motor delivers a remarkable 240 miles per charge, enabling extended driving range for daily commutes or weekend adventures. Powered by a lithium-ion battery, this vehicle guarantees reliability and longevity. Recharging is convenient, with a 10-hour charging time using a standard 240V outlet, allowing you to refuel your electric powertrain overnight. Overall, the Model 3 provides a dynamic driving experience combined with eco-friendly efficiency, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a high-performance electric sedan without sacrificing description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology in this exceptional 2019 Hyundai Sonata Sport. With its striking gray exterior and a host of premium features, this sedan is poised to elevate your driving experience.   Fresh Cabin Filter  New Brakes  New Tires  Fresh Oil Change  Detailed Inside and Out  Multi Point Safety Inspection Performed by Certified Technician  Non-Smoker  Fresh Filters  CARPETED FLOOR MATS  REVERSIBLE CARGO TRAY  MUD GUARDS  REAR BUMPER APPLIQUE  CARGO NET  New Tires Installed New Brakes Installed  Powered by a robust 2.4L I4 DGI DOHC 16V engine and paired with a smooth-shifting 6-Speed Automatic with Shiftronic transmission, this Sonata Sport delivers an impressive blend of efficiency and performance. With an EPA-estimated 25 MPG in the city and 33 MPG on the highway, you'll enjoy the perfect balance of power and fuel economy.  Beyond its dynamic capabilities, this Sonata Sport is packed with a wealth of advanced technologies and premium amenities. Indulge in the convenience of a power driver's seat, dual-zone automatic climate control, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM radio. Stay connected with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, while the rearview camera and Blue Link emergency communication system provide added peace of mind.  Designed to impress, the Sonata Sport's sleek exterior features bold styling cues and 17-inch alloy wheels that exude a sporty, confident presence. Step inside the well-appointed cabin, where you'll be greeted by heated front sport seats, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, and a host of other premium touches that elevate the driving experience.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and this Sonata Sport delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features. Enjoy the added security of dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, a knee airbag, and a range of electronic stability and traction control systems.  This 2019 Hyundai Sonata Sport is a remarkable opportunity to own a well-equipped, meticulously maintained sedan that offers exceptional value. With its compelling blend of style, performance, and technology, it's the perfect choice for the discerning driver. description: Welcome to BZ MOTORS in South Gate, Los Angeles!Are you in the market for a reliable and powerful pickup truck? Look no further than our 2019 Nissan Titan King Cab S Pickup 4D 6 1/2 FT. This impressive vehicle is available now at our dealership and is ready to take on any job you throw its way. With its sleek design, advanced technology, and unbeatable performance, the Nissan Titan is the perfect choice for any car buyer. Keep reading to learn more about this amazing truck and why you should make it your next purchase at BZ  Power and PerformanceThe 2019 Nissan Titan is equipped with a V8, 5.6-liter engine that delivers a whopping 390 horsepower and 394 lb-ft of torque. This powerful engine is paired with a 7-speed automatic transmission, providing smooth and efficient shifting. Whether you're hauling heavy loads or cruising on the highway, the Nissan Titan has the power and performance to handle it all with  Technology for a Modern Driving ExperienceThe Nissan Titan is not just a powerful truck, it also comes packed with advanced technology to enhance your driving experience. With features like a backup camera, NissanConnect, and Bluetooth wireless connectivity, you can stay connected and in control while on the road. The push-button start and keyless entry make it convenient to get in and start your truck without fumbling for your keys. description: The 2020 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 4WD Crew Cab Short Bed LT Trail Boss is a remarkable pickup truck that combines strength, advanced technology, and safety features, making it a standout choice for drivers seeking versatility and performance.   Under the hood, the Silverado 1500 boasts a robust EcoTec3 5.3L V-8 gasoline engine, delivering a remarkable 355 horsepower, paired with a responsive 10-speed automatic transmission. This powerful engine ensures that whether youre towing heavy loads or navigating rough terrains, you have the performance you need.   One of the most impressive features of the Silverado 1500 is its **4-wheel drive** system. This system allows for enhanced traction and stability, ensuring that you can confidently drive through a variety of conditions, from slippery roads to rugged off-road trails. The capability to switch between part-time and full-time 4-wheel/all-wheel drive gives you the flexibility to adapt to changing road conditions seamlessly.  In addition to its powerful performance, the Silverado 1500 is equipped with cutting-edge technology that enhances the driving experience. The **Smart device mirroring** feature allows you to connect your smartphone effortlessly to the vehicles infotainment system, providing easy access to navigation, music, and apps while keeping your focus on the road.   Furthermore, the **Mobile hotspot** feature turns your truck into a Wi-Fi hub, enabling you and your passengers to stay connected on the go without using your mobile data. This is a fantastic addition for long road trips, ensuring everyone can stay entertained or productive while traveling.  Safety is also a top priority in the Silverado 1500, as highlighted by its **Brake assist** technology. This system detects emergency braking situations and applies maximum stopping power to help avoid accidents, providing peace of mind during your journeys.   For those who enjoy long drives, the **Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls** makes it easy to maintain a steady speed, reducing fatigue and improving fuel efficiency. The **Keyfob vehicle start control** allows you to remotely start your truck, ensuring a comfortable cabin temperature before you even step inside.   With a user-friendly **Touchscreen** interface, controlling various functions in the Silverado 1500 is a breeze.   In summary, the 2020 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 4WD Crew Cab Short Bed LT Trail Boss is a blend of power, technology, and safety features. Its perfect for drivers who demand reliability and innovation in their vehicle. Explore the capabilities of this outstanding model today! Our Front Wheel Drive SUV also comes with athletic handling from G-Vectoring Control, plus it scores nearly 31mpg on the highway. Elevate your style with our Mazda CX-5's bold 17-inch alloy wheels, LED headlights, a rear roof spoiler, and power mirrors with built-in turn signals.   Our Touring cabin is a great place to spend time and greets you with heated leatherette front seats, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, Advanced Keyless Entry, pushbutton ignition, and Mazda Connect infotainment technology that makes it easy to stay in touch. Highlights include a 7-inch touchscreen display, a console-mounted controller, Apple CarPlay®/Android Auto®, Bluetooth®, and a six-speaker sound system.   Mazda helps you feel confident exploring your world with smart technology such as adaptive cruise control, automatic braking, a backup camera, blind-spot monitoring, lane-keeping assistance, dynamic stability control, and more. It's time to reward yourself with the remarkable real-world benefits of our Mazda CX-5 Touring! Save this Page and Call for Availability. description: Audi Rancho Mirage is delighted to showcase, this Pre-Owned 2021 Mercedes-Benz GLC 300 4MATIC. Dressed in an evocative Selenite Grey Metallic and with just 28,279 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the potent combination of high performance and sophistication that Mercedes-Benz embodies.   The GLC 300 4MATIC stands as a beacon of design and performance, its Selenite Grey Metallic exterior not just a color, but a badge of honor that reflects Mercedes-Benzs luxury SUV lineage. Adorned with 18" 5-Spoke Wheels, Chrome Roof Rails, and LED Headlamps & Taillamps, it presents a sleek and confident presence. The Off-Road Exterior Package and Parking Sensors elevate utility while adding refined ruggedness to its persona.     Step inside and the Black MB-Tex interior greets you, exuding an air of premium comfort that only Mercedes-Benz can deliver. The cabin is further elevated by Natural Grain Black Ash Wood Center Console, Brushed Aluminum Door Trim, and a Black Fabric Headliner. Premium amenities like Heated Front Seats, 10.25" Center Media Display, and MBUX Multimedia System with Voice Control provide modern connectivity and luxurious convenience.    Engine and Performance: At the heart of this athletic SUV lies a 2.0-liter inline-4 turbocharged engine producing a dynamic 255 horsepower and 273 lb-ft of torque. Paired with a 9-speed automatic transmission and 4MATIC all-wheel drive, it ensures a seamless blend of performance, efficiency, and all-weather capability. The DYNAMIC SELECT system and Off-Road Comfort Suspension offer versatile handling dynamics tailored to your drive.      Key Features:     MBUX Multimedia System with Voice Control:  Advanced infotainment powered by artificial intelligence that learns your preferences over time.    LED Headlamps and Taillamps:  Bright and efficient lighting with a modern design signature.    Blind Spot Assist:  Enhances safety by monitoring surrounding traffic and alerting the driver to unseen vehicles.    Heated Front Seats:  Comfort-focused heating ensures warmth during colder drives.    Hands-Free Access Package:  Includes keyless entry and power liftgate for ultimate convenience.    Apple CarPlay & Android Auto:  Seamless smartphone integration for navigation, calls, and entertainment.    PRE-SAFE System:  Predictive occupant protection system that prepares the vehicle in the event of a collision.    This 2021 Mercedes-Benz GLC 300 4MATIC is far more than just a car; it is the embodiment of the brand's commitment to peak automotive engineering and opulent design. Available at Audi Rancho Mirage, this vehicle offers an invitation to experience the thrill of a luxury SUV that balances excitement and elegance.       Audi Rancho Mirage is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful redesigned showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade-in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email, or drop by our location at 71265 CA-111, Rancho Mirage, CA 92270. description: ===== 2021 Toyota RAV4 XLE for sale near Woodland and Sacramento CA =====Meet the 2021 Toyota RAV4 XLE, a compact SUV that proves practicality can still be fun. Whether you are cruising through Sacramento traffic or heading up to Tahoe for a weekend escape, this RAV4 is ready to take on every mile with confidence and comfort. It is the perfect mix of sporty, smart, and stylish basically the reliable friend who always shows up on time and never complains about gas prices.==== Designed for Comfort and Everyday Adventure ====The RAV4 XLE offers a cloth interior that balances comfort with durability, making every drive feel just right. This SUV is built to handle both your weekday routine and your weekend adventures with ease. From morning commutes through Woodland to late night grocery runs, the RAV4 is always up for the task. It delivers the smooth, stable drive Toyota is known for, with just enough attitude to keep things interesting.==== Why Drivers Love the Toyota RAV4 XLE ====The 2021 RAV4 XLE delivers versatility, fuel efficiency, and Toyota dependability in one sharp package. It has the right balance of power and practicality, making it ideal for families, commuters, or anyone who wants an SUV that can keep up with their busy life. Whether you are exploring Northern California backroads or parking downtown, this RAV4 feels right at home.==== Added Peace of Mind ====This vehicle comes backed by the Hoblit Select Shield Program, which includes a 3 Month or 3000 Mile Powertrain Warranty for added confidence. That means you can enjoy your drives knowing you are covered by a family owned dealership that has been trusted since 1949.==== Why Shop Hoblit Dodge ====At Hoblit Dodge in Historic Downtown Woodland, we have been serving Northern California drivers for generations with honesty and small town service. As the number one Ram Truck Dealership in California, we are proud to serve customers across Sacramento, Elk Grove, Folsom, Roseville, the Bay Area, Reno, Tahoe, Yuba City, and Colusa. We treat every guest like family, and we believe a handshake still means something.==== Call to Action ====Call Hoblit Dodge today to schedule your test drive of this 2021 Toyota RAV4 XLE. description: The 2022 Hyundai Santa Fe SE, featuring the **Option Group 01**, is an exceptional midsize SUV that seamlessly combines performance, comfort, and advanced safety technology. With a robust Smartstream 2.5L I-4 engine, this vehicle produces an impressive 191 horsepower, paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission that ensures a smooth and responsive driving experience tailored for both city and highway travel.  One of the standout highlights of the Santa Fe SE is its advanced hands-on steering assist and lane centering technology. This innovative feature allows drivers to set their desired speed while the vehicles sensors maintain a safe distance from other cars, ensuring they stay centered within their lane. This capability transforms long road trips, making them more enjoyable and less stressful for everyone involved.  Safety is a top priority in the 2022 Hyundai Santa Fe SE. The forward collision mitigation system with left turn assist actively monitors the road ahead, detecting potential collisions and automatically applying the brakes if necessary. Coupled with pedestrian impact prevention technology, the Santa Fe SE enhances safety for both passengers and pedestrians, making it a reliable choice for family outings.  The adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go feature is another impressive aspect of the Santa Fe SE. It automatically adjusts the vehicles speed based on traffic conditions, stopping when necessary and resuming speed when the road clears. This is particularly advantageous during heavy traffic, allowing for a more relaxed driving experience.  Moreover, the driver attention monitor is a valuable addition that alerts drivers if they exhibit signs of drowsiness or distraction. This feature ensures that the driver remains focused on the road, enhancing safety for all passengers.  The active blind spot system further reinforces the Santa Fe SEs safety features by alerting drivers to vehicles in their blind spots, helping to prevent unsafe lane changes. In addition to these technologies, the lane departure prevention system aids in keeping the vehicle within its designated lane, providing peace of mind during every journey.  In summary, the 2022 Hyundai Santa Fe SE, equipped with the **Option Group 01**, stands out as an excellent choice for anyone seeking a reliable, safe, and enjoyable driving experience. With its powerful engine and extensive suite of advanced safety features, this SUV is well-prepared for any adventure on the road. Whether youre commuting, running errands, or embarking on a family road trip, the Santa Fe SE has you covered.  Harbor Hyundai is the top destination for used vehicles in Southern California. description: Step into the future of efficient, eco-conscious driving with this stunning 2022 Kia Niro Plug-In Hybrid LXS in sophisticated Aurora Black Pearl. As a proud Kia Platinum Dealer Award winner, Mission Viejo Kia is thrilled to present this innovative hybrid that perfectly balances environmental responsibility with everyday practicality.  According to CARFAX, this vehicle comes with a clean history report showing no accidents or damage reported since new. The CARFAX report verifies the mileage accuracy, giving you complete confidence in this vehicle's documented past. Better yet, you'll have additional peace of mind knowing this vehicle is still covered under its active manufacturer warranty, making it a smart and secure choice for your next vehicle.  Imagine starting your day with the convenience of plug-in charging, knowing you're ready for whatever adventures lie ahead. The sleek exterior design, accented with chrome details and body-colored trim, turns heads while maintaining the sophisticated presence you desire. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out for a weekend getaway, the Niro PHEV delivers an impressive blend of efficiency and versatility.  Inside, you'll discover a thoughtfully designed cabin that serves as your connected command center. The dual LCD monitors keep vital information at your fingertips, while Android Auto and Apple CarPlay integration ensures you're always in touch with your digital world. The cloth seats provide comfort for all passengers, and the adjustable steering wheel helps you find that perfect driving position. Climate control with multi-zone air conditioning means everyone stays comfortable, no matter the weather outside.  Safety and peace of mind come standard with an impressive array of advanced features. From the Blind Spot Monitor to Lane Departure Warning and Front Collision Mitigation, this Niro PHEV helps protect you and your loved ones on every journey. The backup camera makes parking a breeze, while the comprehensive airbag system provides protection from every angle.  Storage solutions abound with thoughtful touches like cargo area concealed storage and convenient cargo lights. The pass-through rear seat configuration offers flexible space for everything from grocery runs to camping gear. The power door locks, keyless entry, and remote engine start add convenience to your daily routine, while the automatic headlights and privacy glass maintain a premium feel.  The hybrid powertrain combines a 1.6L engine with an electric motor, delivering responsive performance while maximizing efficiency. Front-wheel drive and a sophisticated suspension system ensure a smooth, controlled ride, whether you're navigating city streets or cruising down the highway. The combination of regenerative braking and plug-in charging capability means fewer stops at the gas station and more time enjoying the journey.  Ready to make this vehicle yours? Visit us at Mission Viejo Kia, located at 28802 Marguerite Pkwy, Mission Viejo, CA 92692. Give us a call at 949-347-0500 or explore our inventory online at https://www.missionviejokia.com/. description: The 2022 Chevrolet Equinox FWD 2FL is an exceptional SUV that combines safety, technology, and comfort in a stylish package. Recently, the price has dropped by $345, making it a prime opportunity for prospective buyers to take action quickly before this deal slips away!One of the key features of the Equinox is its advanced *forward collision mitigation* system, designed to help prevent accidents by continuously monitoring the road ahead. This innovative technology prepares the vehicle and occupants for potential impacts, significantly reducing the severity of collisions and enhancing peace of mind during every drive. Additionally, the *front pedestrian impact prevention* system works tirelessly to recognize pedestrians on the road, implementing preventative measures to avoid accidents, making the Equinox an excellent choice for urban driving.Connectivity is a breeze with the inclusion of the *mobile hotspot* feature, which allows passengers to connect multiple devices to the internet without draining your mobile data. This adds a layer of entertainment and convenience while on the go. The *rear camera* enhances safety during reversing maneuvers by providing a clear visual of obstacles behind you, ensuring you remain aware of your surroundings.Safety is prioritized with features like *lane departure prevention*, which alerts drivers to unintended lane changes and automatically corrects the vehicles path if necessary. In sudden situations, the *brake assist* feature detects panic braking and applies additional stopping power to help avoid accidents effectively.Comfort is another hallmark of the Equinox, with the *power reclining driver seat* allowing for effortless adjustments for optimal driving comfort. The vehicle also includes *power 2-way lumbar support*, along with height and cushion tilt adjustments, providing a personalized driving experience that minimizes fatigue during longer trips.The user-friendly *touchscreen* interface makes it simple to control vehicle features, while the *cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls* helps maintain a steady speed, reducing the strain of long drives and allowing for a more enjoyable journey.In summary, the 2022 Chevrolet Equinox FWD 2FL is a well-rounded vehicle that balances safety, technology, and comfort seamlessly. Whether youre commuting or heading out on family adventures, this compact SUV is designed to meet your needs with style and ease. description: Experience the power and sophistication of the 2022 Mazda CX-9 Touring. This stunning SUV combines exceptional performance, advanced technology, and premium comfort to elevate your driving experience.  Highlights include:  Touring Premium Package with Power Sliding Glass Moonroof, Wireless Phone Charger, and LED Foglights  All-Weather Floor Mats for all 3 rows  First Aid Kit  Under the hood, the CX-9 Touring is equipped with a 2.5L 4-Cylinder engine mated to a 6-Speed Automatic transmission and Mazda's renowned AWD system. This powertrain delivers an impressive balance of power and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 20 MPG in the city and 26 MPG on the highway.  Inside, the CX-9 Touring pampers you with thoughtful amenities, including Heated Front Bucket Seats, Leather Seat Trim, and a Wireless Phone Charger for convenient on-the-go connectivity. The Infotainment System with Voice Command and Mazda Connected Services keeps you seamlessly connected, while the 6-Speaker Audio System provides a premium listening experience.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, and an Emergency Communication System to give you and your loved ones peace of mind on the road.  This Mazda CX-9 Touring is Mazda Certified Pre-Owned, meaning it has undergone a rigorous 160-point inspection and comes with a comprehensive warranty package. Enjoy the confidence of a like-new vehicle at a tremendous value. description: .Experience Luxury and Adventure with the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee LAre you in the market for a new SUV that combines style, comfort, and rugged performance? Look no further than the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L, available at Cartime - Southgate in South Gate, Los Angeles, California. This versatile and capable vehicle is perfect for both city driving and off-road adventures, making it the ultimate choice for car buyers.Unmatched Power and EfficiencyThe 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L is equipped with a V6 VVT engine that delivers an impressive 3.6 liters of power. Paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, this SUV offers smooth and efficient performance on any terrain. And with 2WD and ABS (4-wheel) capabilities, you can confidently take on any road condition with ease.Top-Notch Safety FeaturesYour safety is our top priority, which is why the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L comes with a variety of advanced safety features. The Adaptive Cruise Control and Lane Management System help you maintain a safe distance from other vehicles and stay in your lane, while the Blind-Spot Alert and Rear ParkSense Park Assist provide extra assistance when navigating through traffic or parking. Additionally, the Hill Start Assist Control ensures a smooth start on steep inclines, giving you peace of mind on your travels.Luxurious Comfort and ConvenienceThe 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L is designed to provide the ultimate driving experience. With leather seats, dual power seats, and heated seats, you and your passengers can relax in comfort during long drives. The rear air conditioning and oversized premium wheels (20"+) add to the luxurious feel of this SUV. And with features like power door locks, power liftgate release, and push-button start, convenience is at your fingertips.Stay Connected on the GoThe 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L is equipped with the latest technology to keep you connected and entertained while on the road. The Uconnect system allows you to access your favorite apps, make hands-free calls, and stream music through Bluetooth wireless. And with SiriusXM satellite radio, you'll have endless entertainment options to choose from.Ready for Any AdventureWhether you're heading for a weekend getaway or a rugged off-road trip, the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L is up for the challenge. Its electronic stability control, fog lights, and LED headlamps ensure a smooth and safe ride in any weather condition. And with a roof rack and quad seating (4 buckets), you'll have plenty of space to bring all your gear along for the ride.Get Your Hands on the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L TodayReady to experience the ultimate combination of luxury and adventure? Visit Cartime - Southgate in South Gate, Los Angeles, California, and test drive the 2022 Jeep Grand Cherokee L. With its powerful engine, advanced safety features, and luxurious amenities, this SUV is sure to exceed your expectations. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make it yours today!

description: Why BUY from Heights Nissan?     When you choose this Platinum White Pearl 2023 Honda Accord Sedan EX with 40,127 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!           What this vehicle includes:               Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. Meticulously crafted with your needs in mind, the 2023 Acadia AT4 boasts an impressive array of premium features that set it apart. Indulge in the luxurious White Frost Tricoat exterior, complemented by the sophisticated JET BLACK, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM. The TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE, featuring HD Surround Vision and a Head-Up Display, elevates your driving experience with unparalleled convenience and awareness. Elevate your comfort further with the PREFERRED PACKAGE, which includes a heated steering wheel and a host of other thoughtful amenities. Seamlessly integrate your smartphone with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, while the Bose Premium 8-Speaker Audio System delivers an exceptional listening experience. The 8-inch Multi-Color Enhanced Driver Instrument Information Display keeps you informed and in control, while the Power Tilt & Telescopic Steering Column ensures a personalized driving position.  Beneath the sleek exterior, the Acadia AT4 boasts a powerful 3.6L V6 SIDI engine paired with a 9-Speed Automatic transmission and All-Wheel Drive. With an impressive 19 city / 26 highway MPG, this SUV delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, making it the perfect companion for your daily adventures and weekend getaways.  Safety is paramount in the 2023 Acadia AT4, with features like Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, Knee Airbag, and Occupant Sensing Airbag ensuring your well-being. The Electronic Stability Control and 4-Wheel Disc Brakes with ABS provide confident handling and responsive stopping power, while the Auto High-Beam Headlights and Rear Window Wiper enhance visibility and convenience.  Experience the unparalleled combination of style, capability, and technology in the 2023 GMC Acadia AT4. This exceptional SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience and exceed your expectations. description: The **2023 Hyundai Santa Fe SEL** is an outstanding SUV that combines performance, advanced technology, and top-notch safety features, now available at a reduced price of $-564! This price drop is a rare opportunity, so act quickly to secure this incredible vehicle before the offer vanishes.  Powering the Santa Fe SEL is a robust Smartstream 2.5L I-4 engine, delivering an impressive 191 horsepower paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission. This dynamic duo ensures a responsive and smooth driving experience, whether youre navigating through busy urban streets or embarking on longer adventures.  One of the notable features of the Santa Fe SEL is the **Smart device mirroring**, which seamlessly connects your smartphone to the vehicles infotainment system. This feature enhances both safety and convenience, allowing you to manage navigation and calls without diverting your attention from the road.  Safety is paramount in the Santa Fe SEL, exemplified by the **Front pedestrian impact prevention** system. This innovative technology continuously monitors the road ahead for pedestrians, providing alerts and taking preventive measures to avoid potential collisions in high-traffic areas.  Another impressive feature is the **Hands-on steering assist/lane centering**, which acts as your reliable co-pilot by helping maintain your lane and speed effortlessly. This reduces fatigue and enhances comfort during extended journeys.  For those who travel frequently, the **Adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go** and **Automatic curve slowdown cruise control** significantly alleviate driving stress by automatically adjusting your speed based on traffic conditions, ensuring every trip is more enjoyable and less taxing.  Additional safety features include **Brake assist**, enhancing stopping power during emergencies, and the **Power open and close liftgate**, which provides convenient access to the cargo area when your hands are full. Plus, the **Heated driver and front passenger seats** offer additional comfort during colder weather.  In summary, the **2023 Hyundai Santa Fe SEL** is not just a vehicle; its a perfect blend of advanced technology, safety, and comfort. description: Discover the perfect blend of style, technology, and efficiency with the 2023 Kia Sportage Plug-In Hybrid X-Line Prestige. This captivating crossover SUV offers a premium driving experience that seamlessly combines dynamic performance with uncompromising comfort and convenience.  Elevate your commute with the following standout features:   Shadow Matte Gray exterior  Gray interior with premium SynTex leatherette seating  Heated and ventilated front bucket seats  Harman Kardon® premium audio system  Panoramic sunroof  Under the hood, the Sportage Plug-In Hybrid's 1.6L Turbo GDI 4-cylinder engine and 6-speed automatic transmission deliver a thrilling and efficient ride, complemented by the vehicle's advanced all-wheel-drive system. Whether navigating city streets or exploring the open road, this Kia crossover provides the power and capability you demand.  Indulge in the latest technology and connectivity features, including a state-of-the-art navigation system, Apple CarPlay®, Android Auto, and a host of advanced driver-assistance systems. Stay connected and in control, no matter where your journey takes you.  Designed with your needs in mind, the Sportage Plug-In Hybrid's spacious and versatile interior offers ample room for passengers and cargo. Easily adapt to your lifestyle with the power liftgate and split-folding rear seats, ensuring a seamless transition between work, play, and everything in between.  Enjoy exceptional peace of mind knowing this Kia Certified Pre-Owned vehicle is backed by the brand’s industry-leading CPO program. description: Gillman's Lifetime Engine Warranty lasts as long as you own your vehicle - free with the Gillman Pre-Owned Promise. If the vehicle isn't right for you, return it in purchase condition within 2 days or 200 miles as part of our Happy-Driving Guarantee. Take command of the road and the jobsite with this 2024 Ram 3500 Laramie Crew Cab Dual Rear Wheel Pickup. Dressed in classic white, it's powered by the legendary Cummins 6.7L Turbo Diesel I6 (370hp, 850 ft-lbs) paired with an 8-speed shiftable automatic transmission and true 4x4 capability. The 8-foot long bed with spray-in bedliner, 50-gallon fuel tank, and factory towing package-including Class V hitch, trailer brake controller, and blind-spot monitoring with trailer coverage-make this truck ready for heavy hauling. Inside, enjoy luxury and technology with leather-trimmed bucket seats, heated and ventilated front seats, heated steering wheel, and customizable 7-inch instrument cluster. Stay connected via Uconnect with an 8.4-inch touchscreen, wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, Amazon Alexa, SiriusXM, and built-in Wi-Fi hotspot. Convenience and safety features include front and rear parking sensors, 360-degree camera with bed view, power folding towing mirrors, power adjustable pedals, and Laramie Level 1 Equipment Group. Rugged rubber floor mats and Protection Group add durability for tough work. This Ram 3500 is the ideal choice for those who demand capability, luxury, and cutting-edge tech in one powerhouse truck. description: Experience luxury, performance, and versatility with the 2016 Acura MDX 3.5L in stunning White Diamond Pearl, now available at Toyota of Fort Walton Beach. This meticulously maintained SUV offers a refined driving experience, combining power, comfort, and cutting-edge technology, ideal for families and discerning drivers alike.  Powered by a smooth and efficient 3.5L V6 SOHC i-VTEC 24V engine paired with a responsive 9-speed automatic transmission, the MDX delivers a balanced 19 MPG city and 27 MPG highway for confident and economical driving. This recent arrival features Ebony Leather seating with heated front sport seats, spacious 3rd-row split-bench seats, and premium amenities that enhance every journey. description: This 2016 Nissan Altima 2.5 S is a reliable sedan featuring a 2.5L I4 engine with 182hp and 180ft. lbs. of torque. The Glacier White exterior gives it a sleek and modern look, while the Charcoal interior offers a comfortable and stylish driving experience.  As a factory default, this Altima comes equipped with a range of features to enhance convenience and safety. Inside, you'll find cloth upholstery, a 6-way manually adjustable driver's seat, and a 4-way manually adjustable front passenger seat for personalized comfort. The 60/40 split-folding rear seats provide flexibility for cargo space.  Technology-wise, the vehicle includes a 5-inch color display with a rearview monitor, Bluetooth hands-free phone system, and Siri Eyes Free for seamless connectivity on the go. The Advanced Drive-Assist Display keeps essential information in your line of sight, while the audio system with four speakers ensures an enjoyable driving soundtrack.  In terms of performance, the Altima 2.5 S achieves an impressive fuel efficiency of 27 MPG in the city and 39 MPG on the highway, making it an economical choice for daily commuting or road trips. With its combination of practical features and efficient performance, this Nissan Altima offers a balanced driving experience for those seeking a dependable sedan. description: The **2025 Ford Escape ST-Line** with the *Equipment Group 301A* package is an incredible SUV option for drivers who prioritize style, performance, and advanced safety features. Recently, the price has dropped by $893, making it essential for potential buyers to act quickly. This limited-time price reduction provides an exceptional opportunity to invest in a vehicle that combines modern technology with reliability.  Under the hood, the Escape ST-Line features a robust 2.5L I-4 DOHC engine that generates a commendable 163 horsepower, paired with a continuously variable transmission CVT. This powerful combination not only delivers a dynamic driving experience but also ensures excellent fuel efficiency, enabling you to enjoy longer road trips without frequent refueling stops.  Safety is paramount in the Escape ST-Line, highlighted by advanced features like **Front Pedestrian Impact Prevention**. This innovative system actively monitors the road ahead, identifying pedestrians to help avoid potential collisions. Additionally, the **Rear Collision Mitigation** system offers peace of mind by using sensors to detect obstacles behind the vehicle, enhancing your confidence while reversing.  Connectivity options are plentiful in the Escape ST-Line. The **Mobile Hotspot** feature allows you and your passengers to stay connected to the internet without draining your data plan, making it perfect for families and professionals on the go. Furthermore, the **Rear Camera** provides a clear view of your surroundings, ensuring safer parking and maneuvering in tight spaces.  The **Lane Departure Prevention** system is another standout feature, alerting you to unintended lane drift and taking corrective measures to maintain your lane. This technology significantly reduces driver fatigue, particularly during long journeys, and enhances overall road safety.  Driver comfort is also prioritized in the Escape ST-Line, with features like the **Power Reclining Driver Seat** and **Power 2-Way Driver Lumbar Support** that allow for personalized seating adjustments. The intuitive **Touchscreen** interface simplifies control access, providing a convenient way to manage essential vehicle features at your fingertips.  In summary, the **2025 Ford Escape ST-Line** with the *Equipment Group 301A* package is a remarkable vehicle that blends safety, technology, and comfort seamlessly. With the current price drop, this is the perfect moment to explore what this exceptional SUV has to offer. Dont miss this opportunity to elevate your driving experience with the Escape ST-Line![!@@Additional Info@@!]Equipment Group 301A,6 Speakers,AM/FM radio: SiriusXM,AM/FM Stereo,Radio data system,SYNC 4,Air Conditioning,Automatic temperature control,Front dual zone A/C,Rear window defroster,Power driver seat,Power steering,Power windows,Remote keyless entry,Steering wheel mounted audio controls,Four wheel independent suspension,Speed-sensing steering,Traction control,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,ABS brakes,Dual front impact airbags,Dual front side impact airbags,Electronic Fuel Door Release,Emergency communication system: SYNC 4 911 Assist,FordPass Connect,Front anti-roll bar,Knee airbag,Low tire pressure warning,Occupant sensing airbag,Overhead airbag,Rear anti-roll bar,Brake assist,Electronic Stability Control,Auto High-beam Headlights,Delay-off headlights,Fully automatic headlights,Panic alarm,Speed control,Bumpers: body-color,Front License Plate Bracket,Power door mirrors,Spoiler,Compass,Driver door bin,Driver vanity mirror,Front reading lights,Illuminated entry,Outside temperature display,Overhead console,Passenger vanity mirror,Pedestrian Alert Sounder,Rear reading lights,Rear seat center armrest,Sport steering wheel,Tachometer,Telescoping steering wheel,Tilt steering wheel,Trip computer,Vinyl/Cloth Front Sport Contour Bucket Seats,Front Bucket Seats,Front Center Armrest,Split folding rear seat,Passenger door bin,Neutral Towing Capability,Alloy wheels,Wheels: 18" Rock Metallic Painted Aluminum,Rear window wiper,Speed-Sensitive Wipers,Variably intermittent wipers

description: Discover the perfect blend of style, capability, and technology in this stunning 2016 Toyota RAV4 SE. With its sleek exterior, spacious interior, and impressive performance, this versatile SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience.   Heated front seats  Power moonroof  Power liftgate  Adaptive cruise control  18" alloy sport wheels  Exterior parking camera rear  Steering wheel-mounted audio controls  Front dual-zone automatic climate control  Memory driver's seat  SofTex-trimmed heated front sport seats  The RAV4 SE's 2.5L 4-cylinder DOHC Dual VVT-i engine and 6-speed automatic transmission with AWD deliver a responsive and efficient ride, with an EPA-estimated 22 MPG in the city and 29 MPG on the highway. Whether you're navigating city streets or exploring the great outdoors, this SUV provides the perfect balance of power and efficiency.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a wealth of premium features designed to enhance your comfort and convenience. The spacious cabin offers ample room for passengers and cargo, with a versatile split-folding rear seat and a power liftgate for easy access. Stay connected with the Entune Audio Plus system, complete with SiriusXM radio and Bluetooth® connectivity.  Safety is also a top priority in the RAV4 SE, with a suite of advanced technologies like the Blind Spot Monitor, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, and the Tire Pressure Monitoring System. You can drive with confidence, knowing that you and your loved ones are well-protected.  With its sleek styling, impressive performance, and exceptional list of features, this 2016 Toyota RAV4 SE is the perfect choice for those seeking a versatile and well-equipped SUV. Experience the difference for yourself and schedule a test drive today. We're confident you'll be impressed by all that this remarkable vehicle has to offer. description: Vehicle Details: 2016 Ford C-Max Hybrid SE  located in Louisville, KY  delivers efficient performance, practical space, and smart features at the best price. The clean CARFAX report verifies a well-maintained history, giving added confidence in your purchase.  Inside, the cabin balances comfort and functionality. Automatic climate control keeps passengers comfortable on every drive, while supportive seating and versatile cargo space make errands and weekend trips simple and convenient. The available Hands Free Bluetooth connectivity ensures safe, seamless phone calls and streaming audio so you can stay connected without taking your eyes off the road.  Safety-conscious drivers will appreciate the composed handling and efficient braking of the hybrid system, along with modern convenience features that simplify daily driving. This 2016 C-Max SE represents a smart value for buyers seeking a reliable, economical hybrid with practical amenities and a verifiable vehicle history.  Located in Louisville, KY, this vehicle is priced to sell and marketed as the best price in the area. Schedule a test drive today to experience the fuel-efficient performance and comfortable ride of this well-maintained 2016 Ford C-Max Hybrid SE. description: The 2016 Honda Pilot EX-L AWD is a midsize three-row SUV that delivers a strong combination of comfort, reliability, and all-weather capability. It is powered by a 3.5-liter V6 engine paired with an automatic transmission, providing smooth acceleration and confident highway performance, while the all-wheel-drive system enhances traction in rain, snow, and varying road conditions. The EX-L trim adds premium features such as leather upholstery, heated front seats, a power moonroof, a power tailgate, and advanced infotainment with smartphone integration. The interior is spacious and well designed, offering seating for up to eight passengers, a quiet ride, and flexible cargo space. Overall, the 2016 Pilot EX-L AWD is a practical and dependable SUV well suited for family use and year-round driving. This one-owner personal vehicle offers a clean and transparent ownership history. The leather material is luxurious to the touch, offers a distinctive look, and is easy to clean. Put a little luxury behind you with leather seat upholstery.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.In-car Entertainment Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. description: Command attention and conquer the road in this 2016 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT 4WD. Finished in timeless Black and loaded with premium features, this full-size pickup blends rugged capability with refined luxury. With 108,512 miles, this well-equipped Sierra is ready for both work and play.    Under the hood, the powerful **5.3L EcoTec3 V8 engine with Active Fuel Management and Direct Injection** delivers the muscle you expect from a GMC truck, paired with a smooth **8-speed electronically controlled automatic transmission** for confident handling on any terrain. The **Off-Road Suspension Package**, **Hill Descent Control**, **Underbody Shield**, and **Locking/Limited Slip Differential** make it ready for tough jobs and weekend adventures alike.    Step inside to find a premium **leather-appointed interior** designed for comfort and control. Enjoy **heated and ventilated front bucket seats**, a **leather-wrapped heated steering wheel**, **power driver and passenger seats**, and **automatic climate control** that keeps the cabin comfortable in every season. The **Power Sunroof** and **Power Rear Sliding Window with Rear Defogger** add open-air enjoyment and convenience.    Technology and connectivity come standard with features like the **8'' Color Touch Screen Navigation with IntelliLink**, **Bluetooth Connection**, **Bose Premium 6-Speaker Audio System**, **Wireless Charging**, and **Universal Garage Door Opener**. Stay informed and entertained wherever you go. description: Just arrived is this impressive, NO-ACCIDENT, NONSMOKER, TURBOCHARGED 2016 BMW 328i SULEV/sedan! This luxury car is perhaps the strongest performer in its class, delivering a great combination of agility and ride comfort! The 2016 BMW 3 Series was a finalist for the ''Best Upscale Small Car for the Money'' and ''Best Upscale Small Car for Families'' awards by U.S. News & World Report. It was also a finalist for Car and Driver's ''Sports Car of the Year'' award. While it received good safety ratings in some areas, it did not earn the ''TOP SAFETY PICK'' or ''TOP SAFETY PICK+'' from the Insurance Institute for Highway Safety due to its performance in the small overlap front test. It's been driven a relatively light 90,294 miles. Features include: remote keyless entry, push-button start, automatic wipers, cruise control, multi-zone automatic climate control, leatherette premium vinyl upholstery, a leather-wrapped tilt-and-telescoping steering wheel, BMW Assist emergency telematics (may require subscription), Bluetooth phone and audio connectivity, the iDrive electronics interface, a 6.5-inch display and a nine-speaker sound system with a CD player, HD radio, an auxiliary audio jack and a USB port. ''The 328i is a desirable upgrade over the 320i for its exemplary combination of performance and fuel efficiency,'' Edmunds writes. The 328i model uses a more powerful version of the 320i's engine, rated at 240 hp and 255 lb-ft of torque. The EPA estimates an automatic-equipped 328i will achieve 27 mpg combined, while the manual and all-wheel-drive versions (wagon included) are rated at 26 mpg combined, excellent numbers for this class. The 328i sedan further adds LED fog lights, the Sport Line trim package (gloss-black exterior accents, anthracite headliner, sport instrumentation and 10-way power-adjustable sport front seats), power-folding auto-dimming side mirrors with heating, an auto-dimming rearview mirror, wood trim, driver memory functions and split-folding rear seatbacks. This is a SULEV (super ultra-low emissions vehicle), which is a U.S. classification for passenger vehicle emissions. The classification is based on producing 90% fewer emissions than the average gasoline-powered vehicle. So you can enjoy a guilt-free driving experience without having to shell out a fortune on a high-end electric vehicle! Ever the ultimate driving machine, it comes equipped with premium features left and right: Navigation System BMW Online & BMW Apps (may require subscription) Instrument Cluster with Extended Contents Advanced Real-Time Traffic Information Remote Services (subscription required) Driver Assistance Package Rear View Camera Park Distance Control Moonroof ...and you can certainly bet there's a bunch more! You can view vehicle files above this description [on our site], which may include the original brochure and window sticker! Want to extend its warranty coverage? In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! SAVE THOUSANDS off retail pricing and experience sheer driving pleasure with this magnificent condition 2016 BMW 3 Series car! We will happily size up TRADE-IN OFFERS and have EXCELLENT FINANCE OPTIONS as well, so please give us a call at 732-919-0707 (Wall Township) or 856-881-2869 (Sewell) TODAY![!@@Additional Info@@!]Climate Control, Dual Zone Climate Control, Cruise Control, Power Steering, Power Mirrors, Leather Steering Wheel, Rear Air Conditioning, Wood Trim, Clock, Tachometer, Telescoping Steering Wheel, Steering Wheel Radio Controls, Driver Airbag, Passenger Airbag, Side Airbags, Keyless Entry, Security System, Rear Defogger, Fog Lights, Intermittent Wipers, AM/FM, CD Player,  Premium Sound System, SensaTec Interior Surface, Bluetooth, Carpeted Floor Mats, Center Arm Rest, Child Proof Door Locks, Daytime Running Lights, Front Heated Seats, Heated Mirrors, Roll Stability Control, Side Curtain Airbags, Sliding Rear Window, Sport Seats, Tire Pressure Monitor, Vanity Mirrors

description: The 2016 Nissan Pathfinder S is a versatile midsize SUV designed with families and comfort in mind. One of its standout features is the third-row seating, which provides ample space for up to seven passengers, making it an ideal option for larger families or those needing extra passenger capacity. The layout allows for flexible cargo and seating configurations, ensuring practicality for both daily commutes and weekend getaways. The Pathfinder S also comes equipped with side impact airbags, offering an added layer of safety for all occupants by providing enhanced protection in the event of a collision. ----Inside, the vehicle features automatic climate control and rear A/C vents, allowing passengers in all three rows to enjoy a comfortable environment, regardless of their seating position. The automatic climate control system maintains the cabin at the desired temperature with minimal input from the driver, adding convenience to every journey. The push start ignition adds a modern touch to the SUV's user-friendly design, making it easy to get on the road without searching for keys. With these thoughtful features, the 2016 Nissan Pathfinder S delivers a well-rounded driving experience that balances safety, comfort, and functionality, making it a reliable choice for families and drivers who value space and convenience.

The Outback's advanced safety technologies, including the EyeSight Driver Assist system, provide added peace of mind on the road.  Whether you're tackling the daily commute or embarking on a weekend getaway, this 2016 Subaru Outback 3.6R Limited is the perfect companion. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.In-car Entertainment Entertainment system with DVD - Keep boredom at bay. Whether it's driving cross- country or making a quick trip around town, your passengers' favorite videos can come, too! The entertainment system with DVD allows you to keep your passengers entertained no matter where your journey takes you. Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.
